hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams preserve and organize AML case evidence with traceable logs and structured workflows to support regulatory inspections and defensible review.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to assemble consistent, audit-ready evidence from multiple disconnected sources. This fragmentation slows regulatory inspections and complicates defensible documentation during AML and suspicious activity reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates alerts, provider outputs, reviewer actions and decision logs into a unified workflow that simplifies assembling audit-ready evidence for regulatory inspection and AML review.
workflow_title: From alerts to audit-ready case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes screening and monitoring alerts into structured cases where decisions, evidence and reports are preserved for regulatory inspection readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns scattered provider outputs into structured cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence to support VASP compliance teams during regulatory inspections.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in preserving audit-ready evidence and maintaining provider orchestration within secure, governed environments for regulatory inspection readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows preserve audit-ready compliance evidence

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence, reviews and reporting for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage inspection evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures inspection evidence by linking cases, provider results, decisions, regulatory rules and reports into one traceable workflow accessible for compliance teams during audits.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence securely to support audit readiness and regulatory inspection review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into a connected compliance workflow without changing your existing stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above your existing providers and turns their outputs into auditable workflows without replacing the underlying compliance tools.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready evidence for regulatory inspections
final_description: Review how SFTY structures AML case evidence, decision logs and compliance workflows to support VASP inspection readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
